subtitle.value: Authentic Persian cuisine from the heart of West Hampstead. Every dish made fresh with the finest organic ingredients.

items.name: Naan
items.description: Organic white and brown flour flatbread.

items.name: Whole Veggie Naan
items.description: Secret recipe of fresh mixed herbs made in our kitchen.

items.name: Salad Olivieh
items.description: Potato salad mixed with diced chicken, egg, gherkins, carrot, mayonnaise, garden peas and olive oil.

items.name: Must-O-Moosir
items.description: Mix of yogurt and wild shallot dip. (V)

items.name: Must-O-Khiar
items.description: Mix of yogurt, cucumber dip and dry mints. (V)

items.name: Homous
items.description: Mashed chickpeas blended with tahini, garlic, lemon juice and olive oil. (V)

items.name: Salad Shirazi
items.description: Freshly made salad of fine chopped cucumber, tomato, onion, dried mint and a touch of fresh lemon juice. (V)

items.name: Torshi
items.description: Pickled vegetables, chopped or in chunks.

items.name: Mixed Olives
items.description: A generous selection of mixed marinated olives. (V)

items.name: BiBi Salad
items.description: Avocado, tomato, cucumber, butter head salad, chia seed, sesame and a touch of lemon juice. (V)

featuredItem.title: Sini Mezeh
featuredItem.description: A selection of four starters: Kashkeh Bademjan, Mirza Ghasemi, Salad Olivieh and Mast-o-Khiar / Homous — perfect for sharing.

items.name: Kashke Bademjan
items.description: Sauteed aubergine, garlic, walnuts, mint and onions with a trickle of whey.

items.name: Mirza Ghasemi
items.description: Baked crushed chargrilled smoked aubergine with tomatoes and garlic, topped with fried quail egg.

items.name: Ghel Gheli
items.description: Organic minced meatballs cooked in a fine red sauce.

items.name: Dolma
items.description: A selection of mixed herbs and rice in green peppers.

items.name: Bal-e Morgh
items.description: Five slow grilled spicy chicken wings.

items.name: Halloumi Cheese
items.description: Three pieces of fried halloumi in olive oil.

items.name: Chips
items.description: Home-made freshly cut chips.

items.name: Red Lentil Soup
items.description: Freshly blended green peppers, onions, dal, olive oil and garlic. (V)

items.name: Greeny Soup
items.description: Blended mix of fresh broccoli, spinach, potato, oat and a touch of sour cream and lemon juice. (V)

featuredItem.title: Sini — Mix Grill for Two
featuredItem.description: A skewer of Joojeh, Chenjeh and two skewers of Koobideh with grilled tomato, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Kobideh
items.description: Two skewers of juicy minced lamb served with grilled tomato and saffron rice.

items.name: Joojeh
items.description: Saffron and organic yogurt marinated chargrilled Banham Farm free range chicken, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Kabab Torsh
items.description: Chargrilled lamb fillet with pomegranate paste, crushed walnuts and fresh mint, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Baarg
items.description: Chargrilled best end of organic Rhug Farm lamb fillet, served with saffron rice and grilled tomatoes.

items.name: Makhsos
items.description: Chargrilled skewer of organic Rhug Farm lamb fillet and skewer of minced veal, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Momtaz
items.description: One skewer of boneless breast of chicken and one of minced lamb, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Ghafghazi
items.description: A mixed skewer of diced lamb fillet and succulent chicken fillet, served with grilled tomato and saffron rice.

items.name: BIBI Special
items.description: A mixed skewer of chicken and lamb fillet with three pieces of lamb chops, served with grilled tomato and saffron rice.

items.name: Bareh Kabab
items.description: One skewer of fine marinated lamb chops served with grilled tomato and saffron rice.

items.name: Chengeh
items.description: Chargrilled marinated best end of organic Rhug Farm lamb in extra virgin olive oil, served with saffron rice.

featuredItem.title: Ghormeh Sabzi
featuredItem.description: A stew of organic lamb with fresh herbs, red kidney beans and dried lime, served with saffron rice. A Persian national treasure.

items.name: Khoresh Bamieh
items.description: A classic stew of organic okra, potatoes, tomato and green peppers, served with saffron rice. (V)

items.name: Khoresh Badenjan
items.description: Fresh tomato paste, fried onion, smashed garlic and sauce with fried aubergine and mushrooms, served with saffron rice. (V)

items.name: Khoresh Fesenjoon
items.description: Confit duck leg in a sweet and sour sauce of ground walnuts and pomegranate puree, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Baghali Polo-Ba-Gardan
items.description: A Persian favourite — succulent lamb neck served with fragrant fresh dill and broad bean rice.

items.name: Zereshk Polo-Ba-Morgh
items.description: A colourful rice dish jewelled with barberries and saffron, accompanied by braised chicken.

featuredItem.title: Sea Bass
featuredItem.description: Chargrilled marinated whole sea bass in saffron and fresh lemon juice with chef's special sauce, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Meygo
items.description: Tiger prawns marinated in lemon juice, olive oil, paprika and garlic, served with saffron rice.

items.name: Mahi
items.description: Grilled salmon or pan fried to perfection, served with saffron rice. Chef's signature.

featuredItem.title: Persian Ice Cream
featuredItem.description: Traditional saffron ice cream with fresh pistachio. A Bibi classic.

items.name: Falloodeh
items.description: Persian rice noodle sorbet served with fresh lime.

items.name: Shole-Zard
items.description: Home-made Persian sweet pudding rice with pistachio, almond, saffron, rose water and cinnamon.

items.name: Baghlava
items.description: Filo pastry filled with chopped nuts and sweetened with organic honey, served with ice cream.

items.name: Chocolate Gateau
items.description: Exceptional chocolate cake flavoured with melted chocolate and cacao powder.

items.name: Shirin Polo
items.description: Glamorous sweet rice with candied citrus zest, sweet carrots, almond and pistachio. (V)

items.name: Zereshk Polo
items.description: Fragrant saffron rice with barberries, pistachio and almonds. (V)
